title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.796 - Ballot form, content
text:
67.796.  Ballot form, content. — Pursuant to sections 67.793 to 67.795, the question shall be submitted to the voters in the proposed district in substantially the following form:
  (1)  For the creation of a new district:
  (2)  For an addition to a district:
(L. 1995 H.B. 88 § 5, A.L. 1999 S.B. 405)
